PR surface: Source +117, Tests +108. Total +225 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main directly dereferences described schema and contribution properties in the shared discovery path, and the PR body reports a bad-discovery repro that returns the healthy field after the patch; I did not execute repo tests because this review is read-only.

target.title: fix(channels): guard message action schema discovery
target.body:
## Summary
- guards plugin-owned message-tool discovery field reads so getter/proxy-backed action schema metadata cannot crash channel schema discovery
- skips unreadable schema/property contributions while preserving healthy plugin message-tool schema fields
- adds regressions for an unreadable discovery `schema` getter and unreadable schema `properties` map

## Verification
- `node --import tsx - <<'EOF' ... EOF` bad-discovery repro returns `["healthyParam"]`
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/channels/plugins/message-action-discovery.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

Behavior addressed: a malformed channel plugin message-tool discovery result no longer crashes shared message schema discovery before healthy plugin fields can be projected.
Real environment tested: local Codex worktree on macOS with repo symlinked dependencies; remote changed gate pending.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: direct bad-discovery repro; focused channel Vitest file; oxlint on touched files; diff whitespace check; local autoreview.
Evidence after fix: repro returned `["healthyParam"]`; focused suite passed 12 tests; oxlint and diff check passed; autoreview reported no actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: unreadable plugin schema metadata is logged and skipped while healthy message-tool schema contributions remain available.
What was not tested: full `pnpm check:changed` remote gate is pending and will be added after the Crabbox run completes.
target.author: vincentkoc
